name: Stack Room
description: A collaborative developer community platform for resource sharing and learning. Contributed to the frontend architecture and UI components.

name: Stock Trading Platform
description: A simulated stock trading platform with real-time market data visualization, portfolio tracking, and buy/sell order execution. Designed to help beginners understand stock markets.

name: AI Chatbot
description: An intelligent chatbot leveraging Natural Language Processing and machine learning to understand user queries and provide contextual responses.

name: Student Grade Tracker
description: A Java-based desktop application for managing student academic records. Supports grade input, GPA calculation, and performance analysis with data persistence.

name: Track Tracer Robot
description: An autonomous line-following robot built for the IIT Patna tech fest. Uses infrared sensor arrays for real-time path detection and PID-based motor control for smooth navigation.

name: Sand Rover
description: A terrain-adaptive robot designed for sand and rough surface navigation. Features custom wheel design and embedded control systems optimized for unstable surfaces.

name: Droid Blitz
description: An obstacle-avoidance robot with ultrasonic sensor-based environment mapping and intelligent pathfinding. Showcased at IIT Kharagpur tech fest.
